title: Crispy Peruvian Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful Peruvian-inspired dish featuring crispy rice and a variety of textures. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice, water, and Peruvian rice to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
While the rice is cooking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the crisp rice cereal and cook, stirring constantly, until crispy.
Fluff the cooked rice mixture with a fork and serve in bowls.
Top each bowl with crispy rice cereal and your choice of toppings.
